_attribution: LA FORJA team (Manuel Peña Zúñiga). Original item authored by the team.
stem: Triangle PQR is similar to triangle STU, with P corresponding to S, Q to T, and R to U. Side PQ = 9 cm corresponds to side ST = 15 cm. If QR = 12 cm, what is the length of TU?
author_rationale: The correspondence is explicitly stated, so QR corresponds to TU. The scale factor from the first triangle to the second is k = ST/PQ = 15/9 = 5/3. Therefore TU = QR · (15/9) = 12 · 5/3 = 20 cm.
